Note: PT says that it is challenging to read the subtitles and take in the information from the video. They are focused on the subtitles being correct that it is distracting from the video itself.
PT states the text size is a good size, not too large or too small. PT states that it is not transcribing all the correct words — for example the video said “wait” but it transcribed as “weight”.
Sometimes the transcript will only transcribe part of the word — like 3 letters of the word rather than the whole thing.
